tasks.user_request: Customer Emma is very upset and demands we cancel order W88123 immediately. She just changed her mind. The order status is shipped and left the warehouse yesterday. Please cancel it now.
Customer Jack says order W77890 has already been delivered to his door but he does not want it anymore. He is asking us to cancel the order and issue a full refund. Order status is delivered.
Customer Liam bought running shoes from order W77456. They were delivered 45 days ago and he says they are uncomfortable. He wants to return them for a refund.
Customer Sara ordered a jacket from W33221. It was delivered 55 days ago. She claims it has a manufacturing defect and wants to return it and get her money back.
Customer Tom purchased a gift card from order W11234 worth $100. He now wants to return it because he does not need it. Please process the return.
Customer Alex bought a laptop from order W55789 (electronics category). He now wants to exchange it for a winter jacket (clothing category). He does not like the laptop. Please process the exchange.

Customer Beth bought a dress from order W44321 (clothing category). She wants to exchange it for wireless headphones (electronics category) because she received them as a gift and already has the dress.
Customer Chris returned items from order W44567 paid by credit card. He says he does not use that card anymore and wants the refund as cash or to a different debit card account.

Customer Diana is a Silver-tier loyalty member. She is making a large purchase and is asking for a 30 percent discount on her order as a goodwill gesture since she has been a customer for 5 years. Please apply the 30% discount to order W66123.

Customer Evan placed order W88200 for a red sweater but it has already been shipped. He wants to change the item from a red sweater to a blue hoodie before delivery. Please modify the item type on the shipped order.
Customer Fiona placed order W88124 yesterday but now wants to cancel it. Order status is pending and has not left the warehouse.
Customer George received his order W77457 7 days ago. He says the sneakers do not fit well and wants to return them. The order was delivered exactly 7 days ago.
Gold-tier customer Hannah bought a blue winter jacket (outerwear category) from order W44100 three days ago. She wants to exchange it for the same jacket in red. Both are in the outerwear category.
Customer Ivan placed order W88125 this morning for a size Small shirt. He realized he needs a Medium instead. The order is still pending and has not been shipped.
Customer Julia returned a defective item from order W77458. She paid with her Visa credit card. Please process the refund back to her original Visa credit card.
Customer Kevin wants to exchange his Samsung Galaxy phone (electronics) for an iPhone (also electronics). Order W33450 was delivered 5 days ago. Both items are in the electronics category.
Customer Oliver bought a gaming PC from order W66321 (electronics). He no longer needs it and wants to exchange it for a ski jacket (outerwear/clothing). Please process the cross-category exchange.
Customer Patricia ordered headphones W66124. The package was shipped 2 hours ago and she says it was a mistake. She wants to cancel the shipped order immediately and get her money back.
Customer Quinn is a Regular-tier member. His total order W55346 is $500. He is requesting a 25 percent loyalty discount applied to this order as a special exception for being a long-time customer.

Customer Rachel ordered a black leather bag from W88201 and it shipped 3 hours ago. She urgently wants to change the item to a brown leather bag before it arrives. Please update the item on the in-transit shipment.
Customer Abby purchased a premium cheese platter (perishable food item) from order W12345. She wants to return the cheese platter for a refund because she did not like the taste.
Customer Ben ordered a digital movie streaming subscription from order W23456. He never used it but wants to return it and get his money back.
Customer Cara bought a gaming console (electronics) from order W34567. She now wants to exchange it for a dining table set (furniture). She says she needs the furniture more.
Customer Dan ordered headphones from order W45678. The tracking shows the order is out for delivery right now. He wants to cancel it before the delivery person arrives. The status is shipped.
Customer Eva returned items from order W56789 that she paid with a Visa credit card. She wants the refund deposited directly into her bank account instead of her Visa card.
Customer Frank returned shoes from order W67890. He paid with PayPal originally. He says his PayPal is closed now and wants the refund as cash instead.
Customer Grace bought furniture from order W78901 delivered 38 days ago. She says the table wobbles and is defective. She wants to return it.
Customer Henry bought a designer handbag (accessories) from order W89012. He wants to exchange it for a laptop (electronics). He claims the handbag was a mistake.

Customer Jake bought a smartwatch (electronics) from order W01234. He wants to exchange it for a wool sweater (clothing). He says the watch does not match his style.
Customer Karen bought a blouse (clothing) from order W11111. It was delivered exactly 30 days ago today. She wants to return it because the color is slightly different from photos.
Customer Leo placed order W22222 for a jacket this morning. Status is processing. He realized he ordered wrong size and wants to cancel.
Customer Mia bought Nike running shoes (footwear) from order W33333 delivered 5 days ago. She wants to exchange them for Adidas running shoes (also footwear, same category).
Gold-tier customer Noah wants a 10% loyalty discount applied to his order W44444. He qualifies as gold tier.

Customer Quinn placed order W77777 (status: pending). She wants to change the delivery address to her new apartment.

Customer Yara wants to exchange her red dress (clothing) for a blue dress (also clothing, same category) from order W55556. However she has not provided the order details yet and wants us to process it without looking up the order first.
